The 10th ACE is convened by the Organization of American States (OAS) as the Inter-American Competitiveness Network (RIAC) Technical
Secretariat; the Government of the United States, through the U.S. Department of Commerce, the U.S. Department of State, and the
Government of Argentina, through its Ministry of Production, as Chair Pro Tempore of RIAC (September 2017-2019).
